accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context such as the Organic Laws designation and Northwest Ordinance details.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Northwest Ordinance dates and procedural history match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose of reaffirming the Declaration as an Organic Law for the 250th anniversary.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill amends no existing statute; it is purely declaratory, so this criterion does not apply.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions, conditions, or eligibility limits.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes no effective date is specified and gives the June 18, 2026 passage date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the findings, the reaffirmation provision, and the inclusion of the Declaration's full text.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and internally consistent.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Declaration of Independence, Northwest Ordinance, and Constitution as referenced.

correct_figures.why: Dates 1776, 1787, 1789, and June 18, 2026 are all stated correctly.
